prompt: Add haptic feedback to ProblemScreen option taps and submit button. Make the Correct/Not quite result label more visually impactful using typography only (no color).

assertions.text: HapticFeedback.selectionClick() is called when a user taps an answer option in ProblemScreen
HapticFeedback.mediumImpact() is called when the submit/CTA button is tapped in ProblemScreen
The Correct/Not quite result label in FeedbackScreen has a larger font size or heavier font weight than the original
No new Color(0xFF...) or Colors.green/Colors.red literals added for the result label — stays monochromatic
Result label references AppTextStyles.* rather than an inline TextStyle with hardcoded values
